recommendations.title: The Abominable Snowman
recommendations.overview: A kindly English botanist and a gruff American promoter lead an expedition to the Himalayas in search of the legendary Yeti.

recommendations.title: The Day the Earth Caught Fire

recommendations.title: Alien: Romulus
recommendations.overview: While scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station, a group of young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe.

recommendations.title: Casino Royale

recommendations.director: Val Guest, Robert Parrish, Joseph McGrath, Ken Hughes, John Huston

recommendations.title: Solitary
recommendations.overview: A man wakes up inside a room to discover he's a prisoner sent into space to form Earth's first colony, and worse - his cell mate Alana is hell bent on destroying everything.

recommendations.title: Alien Hunter
recommendations.overview: Government agents find evidence of extraterrestrial life at the South Pole.

recommendations.title: Moonraker

recommendations.title: Bring Her Back
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their father, a brother and sister are sent to live with a foster mother, only to learn that she is hiding a terrifying secret.
